nasb.text: For the Lord will not abandon His people on account of His great name, because the Lord has been pleased to make you a people for Himself.

esv.text: For the Lord will not forsake his people, for his great name’s sake, because it has pleased the Lord to make you a people for himself.

cnv.text: 耶和華為了自己的大名的緣故，必不丟棄他的子民，因為他喜歡使你們作他的子民。

ccb.text: 耶和华不会丢弃祂的子民，使自己的大名受损，祂乐意使你们做祂的子民。
